sessionStart.bash: uv sync --all-packages --all-extras --quiet 2>&1 | tail -3; python .github/hooks/harness-review.py 2>&1; [ -f .github/hooks/harness-review.md ] && echo '' && echo '⚠️  Harness review — evaluate and address the findings below before starting work:' && echo '' && cat .github/hooks/harness-review.md || true
